flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Version of the MariaDB container image to deploy (default "11.4")
flags.name: --mariadb-version string

flags.description: Database backend to use (mariadb; pgsql planned, postgres alias accepted) (default "mariadb")
flags.name: -b, --backend string

flags.description: Remove selected backend and clean up Vault database configuration
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Deploy selected database backend and configure Vault
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: Force a clean redeployment of the selected backend
flags.name: -f, --force
